====Pokémon==== =====On hand===== {{anchor|Hatterene 2}}{{TrainerPoké |width=83 |trainer=Bede |gender=female |pkmn=Hatterene |giga=yes |stage1=Hatenna |stage2=Hattrem |type1=Psychic |type2=Fairy|img=Bede {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Hatenna|1=Hattrem}} Adventures.png |cap=Bede's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Hatenna|1=Hattrem}} |img_size=120px |img2=Bede {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Hatterene|1=Gigantamax Hatterene}} Adventures.png |cap2=Bede's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Hatterene|1=Gigantamax Hatterene}} |img2_size=120px |epnum=PASS06 |epname=Watch Out!! Strong Rivals |desc={{p|Hatterene}} is Bede's first known Pokémon. She was first used as a {{p|Hatenna}} to shatter a large boulder blocking the [[Galar Mine]], allowing Bede to collect three [[Wishing Star]]s. She evolved into a {{p|Hattrem}} sometime during Bede's training with [[Opal]] and later into Hatterene while protecting [[Rose]] from {{p|Eternatus}}. She is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing. Hatterene's known moves are {{m|Confusion}} and {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}.
As a Gigantamax Hatterene, it can use {{m|G-Max Smite}}.}} {{anchor|Rapidash 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bede |pkmn=Rapidash |stage1=Ponyta |type1=Psychic |type2=Fairy |img=Bede Ponyta Adventures.png |img_size=170px |img2=Bede Rapidash Adventures.png |img2_size=150px |epnum=PASS10 |epname=Blazing!! Bede's Feelings |desc=A {{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Rapidash}} is Bede's second known Pokémon. It was first used as a {{p|Ponyta}} to attack [[Henry Sword|Henry]], but was defeated by his {{p|Gurdurr|Steeler}}. It evolved into a Rapidash sometime during Bede's training with [[Opal]]. Rapidash's known moves are {{m|Fairy Wind}} and {{m|Agility}}.}} =====Borrowed===== {{anchor|Copperajah 2}}{{TrainerPoké |width=83 |trainer=Rose |pkmn=Copperajah |type1=Steel |img=Bede Rose Copperajah Adventures.png |epnum=PASS14 |epname=Teary!! The Voice of the Master |desc={{p|Copperajah}} originally belonged to [[Rose]]. Bede borrowed it in an attempt to destroy the [[Stow-on-Side]] mural in his pursuit for [[Wishing Star]]s. Rose took it back after Bede was found out. None of Copperajah's moves are known.}} =====Given away===== {{TrainerPoké |width=75 |trainer=Bede |pkmn=Legendary giants |type1=??? |img=Galar Rivals Legendary titans Adventures.png |epnum=PASS36 |epname=Rrmbll!! Serious Tower Battle |desc=Bede, [[Marnie]], and [[Hop]] caught {{p|Regirock}}, {{p|Regice}}, and {{p|Registeel}} in the Crown Tundra while searching for the [[Rusted Sword]] and [[Rusted Shield]]. It was never specified who caught each giant, but they entrusted the three Pokémon to [[Peony]] so they could continue searching for the legendary gear. None of their moves are known.}} =====Traveling with===== {| width="100%" |- | {{ActivePoké|||nick=Rotom Phone|Hop Bede Marnie Rotom Phone Adventures.png|electric|ghost|link=Rotom Phone}} | | |}
